response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:03: Intro animation. 2. 00:03-03:00: Identified 'Carbonated Love' by IRyS through on-screen text. Searched for official lyrics. 3. 03:00-04:43: Talk segment about merch. 4. 04:43-05:04: Merch showcase screen. 5. Lyrics retrieved and formatted.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D performance of the song 'Carbonated Love' by IRyS, followed by a talk segment where IRyS introduces her 3rd anniversary merchandise.

scenes.description: Intro animation of the 3D stage before the song performance begins.
Performance of the song 'Carbonated Love' by IRyS.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
Let's go

[Verse 1]
One, two, three, four
Lost hope in love, I thought I'd never understand
Couldn't help it when you took my hand
Roads I ignored before, you left me wanting more
Destroyed everything just to get a bit ahead
Neon lights fly by, is it fake or reality?
Not sure of much, but know I'm ready
Soaring these streets, make me complete
Full throttle, come give me your all

[Pre-Chorus]
Engine's not keeping up
With the beat of my heart, just can't get enough
Revving up, make it fast
Only us, make it last
'Til the sun's up

[Chorus]
'Nother shot in the dark, take me away
Fizzing up in my heart, it's all okay
Accelerate me until I'm there
You and I reach the line, mark the end but we'll
Keep on goin' until the bubbles fade
I don't care if I don't see another day
Shocking in my heart, give me all that you got
Windows down, don't hesitate a minute more
Time is up, not enough, fill it up and don't look back again
Carbonated Love

[Verse 2]
One, two, three, let's go
Took a bet on love, it's better than I coulda dreamed
Look at what we've done, we're too extreme
Pour me your favorite drink, so much until we sink
Down to the bottom, don't wanna miss a thing
The track we're on might crash, oh, what am I to do?
Rushing in, ignoring old avenues
Race through the night, my guiding light
Sparkling, I'm right here with you

[Pre-Chorus]
Engine's not keeping up
With the beat of my heart, just can't get enough
Revving up, make it fast
Only us, make it last
'Til the sun's up

[Chorus]
'Nother shot in the dark, take me away
Fizzing up in my heart, it's all okay
Accelerate me until I'm there
You and I reach the line, mark the end but we'll (let's go)
Keep on goin' until the bubbles fade
I don't care if I don't see another day
Shocking in my heart, give me all that you got
Windows down, don't hesitate a minute more
Time is up, not enough, fill it up and don't look back again
Carbonated Love

[Bridge]
Come overflow my cup, I'm empty without you
Make such a mess of me, don't care if I'm the fool
Another night of bliss, speed up, let's make it new
Love me despite the way I'm crazy just for you

[Chorus]
'Nother shot in the dark, take me away
Fizzing up in my heart, it's all okay
Accelerate me until I'm there
You and I reach the line, mark the end but we'll (let's go)
Keep on goin' until the bubbles fade
I don't care if I don't see another day
Shocking in my heart, give me all that you got
Windows down, don't hesitate a minute more
Love the rush, we shouldn't
Don't give up, fire it up again
Our time is up, not enough, fill it up and begin
Carbonated Love

scenes.description: IRyS talks to the audience about her 3rd anniversary and the upcoming merchandise.
Merchandise display for the IRyS 3rd Anniversary 2026.
